creator: rehsack@web.de
text:
Hi all,

sure - eclipse-EPIC-0.6.18 isn't official, but neither is 0.6.13 ;)
So argue like this makes your last submission invalid, too.
Or is mine patch more invalid, because there is no .zip-file?

BTW: Attached a new patch, because I made a typo.
Anyone who uses EPIC on FreeBSD may feel free to use this patch,
if (s)he encounters some issues in 0.6.13 development version ...

Best regards,
Jens
